title: Produce a license inventory report
description: Read the lockfile and emit a component-to-SPDX inventory, flagging unknowns and license deltas.
body: Use when asked what licenses a project ships. Actions: read the resolved lockfile, run or trace the ecosystem license tool, and produce a table of component, version, declared license, and resolved SPDX identifier; compare declared metadata to the bundled LICENSE text and mark mismatches. Do not infer a license from the package name or assume the root license covers transitive deps. Report and record each unknown, NOASSERTION, and multi-license component as a finding. This skill is read-only and must not edit dependency manifests without runtime permission. Validation signals include an inventory whose row count matches the lockfile with zero silent unknowns. Risk boundary: report any unresolved or source-available license as a blocking finding and recommend escalation.
